theme: Cut a few links to stop an outbreak
title: Snip the Superspreader Links
strategies: trivial baseline: cut the first k listed contacts (the checker's normalizer) -- negligible spectral drop
weight greedy: cut the k heaviest-weight contacts; looks most infectious but the heavy edges sit off the spectral core (the planted trap)
degree greedy: cut edges incident to the highest-degree nodes; still blind to eigenvector placement
eigen-leverage greedy (strong): cut the edge maximizing w * x_i * x_j on the current Perron vector, recomputing the leading eigenvector after every cut
